reason: NATS subject contracts for uc.heartbeat, uc.subtask.execute, uc.task.event — failover relies on heartbeat monitoring and subtask re-dispatch via NATS
Rust scheduler dispatch logic — need to understand how ready subtasks are published and how results flow back after worker death
Event pipeline for subtask_completed/failed events — failover must emit reassignment events and wake dispatch loop
Worker capabilities and retry policies — max_retries, exponential backoff, recoverable vs non-recoverable failures
